articles.title: MAGA fan buried in vulgar chants as angry concertgoers rain down obscenities
articles.description: A Trump supporter got much more than he bargained for when he attended the Ashnikko concert at Hard Rock Live Orlando on Tuesday. A viral TikTok video showed the crowd jeering and shouting him down for his MAGA hat, which devolved into vulgar chants of "[Expletive] Donald Trump! [Expletive] Donald Trump!" as the man tried to cover his face. Commenters on Reddit had a field day after the incident was posted to r/PublicFreakout. "I’m curious to know if he’s delusional about who/how many support trump or if he was hoping to goad someone into a physical altercation?" asked one commenter. "Considering a MAGA police sgt in Phoenix tried to goad high school students into an altercation so he could beat them senseless....... yes," another replied. Yet another commenter had a whole story to tell. "I have a buddy who became a trumper and no one talks/hang out with anymore cause he turns literally any conversation political and it has gotten to the point where he gets so worked up he start to physically threaten people," said the commenter. "He said he would beat my friends a-- cause he told another friend to 'bring a bag of ice' to party. He took it as if they were making a jab at him and freaked the [expletive] out when they were talking about actual ice for drinks." All around the country, Trump supporters often find themselves unwelcome in some spaces when they openly wear their support. In one 2018 incident , a Trump supporter was kicked out of a bar in Arizona for wearing a MAGA hat, despite her furious objections. @ahorrorborealis He got so embarrassed he covered his face and left! 🤣Like literally WHO told you you could be HERE?! 👎☹️ #fdt #fyp #ashnikko #smoochiestour #orlandoflorida ♬ original sound - Nicole

articles.title: Savannah Guthrie Leaves Today Show During Live Broadcast
articles.description: BRENDAN MCDERMID / REUTERS Savannah Guthrie exited the Today Show during Wednesday morning’s broadcast. Ninety minutes into the four-hour program, she quietly stepped out, with co-anchor Craig Melvin taking over. Melvin addressed her absence, assuring viewers that the 54-year-old wouldn’t be gone for long. “Savannah had to leave a little early. She’ll be right back tomorrow, though,” he said. He did not offer an explanation for her departure. NBC did not immediately respond to the Daily Beast’s request for comment. Guthrie is only a few weeks into her return to the network’s storied morning show. Her position was filled by Hoda Kotb after Guthrie took a two-month hiatus to help in efforts to find her mother, Nancy Guthrie, who was kidnapped earlier this year. The 84-year-old was last seen on January 31 at her Tucson, Arizona, home. Footage from a doorbell camera showed a masked man with a gun at her doorstep. Guthrie returned to her hosting duties after months of an unfruitful investigation into her mother’s disappearance, but has been open about her continued hope. Read it at E! News Read more at The Daily Beast.

articles.title: Forget The Cow Level, Diablo 4 Players Are Now Searching For Cow God
articles.description: Diablo 4 players finally unlocked the game's secret cow level earlier this week, but that has only led to an all-new, even more ridiculous quest--the search for cow god. It was just a few days ago that the secret portal to Diablo 4's cow level was revealed, the grand conclusion to a years-long secret-hunting saga within Blizzard's ARPG. Within the secret cow level waited The Cow King, a new boss that upon defeat rewards not only the wackiest item in Diablo history, but also multiple instances of a rare quest item, Prime Rib. As is usually the case, the key to these secret quests is always in the flavor text, and the flavor text for both of these items are leading players to believe Diablo 4's cow-themed shenanigans are just heating up. Continue Reading at GameSpot
